Author: Miroslav Babitski
Name: System Monitor
Description: Live CPU & memory graphs in the style of the Windows 10 Task Manager, drawn across your deck keys. Place this action on a block of keys (a row, a column, or e.g. 3x3) — keys with the same metric join into one graph that grows wider AND taller. Set one block to CPU and another to Memory to show both.

Actions.Name: System Monitor
Actions.Tooltip: Live CPU/RAM graph — place on a block of keys
